summary: W847 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and names the exact-acyclic selected-cochain strictification boundary behind W783. ExactAcyclicTrianglehIso13SelectedCochainPayload records the per-triangle standard mapping-cone representative, endpoint isomorphisms, mor3 compatibility, and strictly exact-acyclic selected target. exactAcyclicHomotopyObjectTrianglehIso13Realization_of_selected_cochain converts that selected-cochain strictification into W783, and the Dbounded W847 closed-map/closed-embedding routes feed W846. Concrete W735 branch data and the W847 selected-cochain strictification theorem for MetrizableLCA are still missing, so product_success remains false.
